sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: HDFC Bank’s hunt to appoint new chairman gathers momentum
feed.summary: HDFC Bank is actively searching for a new chairman, with five candidates reportedly shortlisted. This move comes as current interim chairman Keki Mistry's term expires on June 19, 2026, and follows the resignation of former chairman Atanu Chakraborty. The new chairman is expected to be appointed in early July.

feed.title: Autodesk’s Built to Move docuseries wins at Tribeca X
feed.summary: Autodesk's three-part docuseries, "Built to Move," won the Episodic Award at Tribeca X, the branded content arm of the Tribeca Film Festival. The series chronicles US Paralympian Mike Schultz's journey, his founding of BioDapt after a snowmobile accident, and his contributions to high-performance prosthetics. Autodesk has partnered with BioDapt to further advance prosthetic design, demonstrating how the company's mission empowers individuals to design and make anything, especially in the context of adaptive sports equipment.

feed.title: Masco Corporation Stock (US5745991068): Fundamentals and valuation in focus for US home-improvement
feed.summary: The article focuses on Masco Corporation (US5745991068), a key supplier to the North American home-improvement market, discussing its fundamentals and valuation. It highlights Masco's role in US equity and ESG strategies due to its exposure to housing and renovation demand. Investors typically analyze Masco's pricing against market benchmarks and peers, considering cyclical housing trends, interest rates, and consumer confidence.

feed.title: GRAPHIC PACKAGING DEADLINE ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire,
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has announced a class action lawsuit against Graphic Packaging Holding Company (NYSE: GPK). The lawsuit alleges that Graphic Packaging made false and misleading statements about its inventory management, demand, costs, and business model between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. Investors who purchased Graphic Packaging securities during this period have until July 6, 2026, to apply to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Trump's Iran Warning Puts Defense Stocks In Focus - General Dynamics (NYSE:GD), iShares U.S. Aerospace &
feed.summary: Former President Donald Trump's recent warning to Iran has brought defense stocks back into investor focus, despite the lack of new policy announcements. Geopolitical risks often drive investment towards aerospace and defense companies, as heightened military tensions lead to increased security spending and modernization programs. This shift in attention comes after months where artificial intelligence and semiconductor stocks dominated the market, highlighting how investors often react to geopolitical uncertainty by seeking refuge in defensive sectors.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser Co. Stock (US9621661043): Valuation in focus after rate moves and lumber volatility
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser Co. shares are being re-evaluated by investors due to current interest rates and fluctuating lumber prices. The company operates timberlands, real estate, and wood products, with its REIT status making it sensitive to housing activity and economic conditions. Its dividend framework and balance sheet strategy are key factors in its valuation, alongside its strong position in sustainable timber management.

feed.title: Amazon and Corning partner to boost fiber optics manufacturing in North Carolina
feed.summary: Amazon is partnering with Corning Inc. in a multibillion-dollar deal to expand data center infrastructure, creating approximately 1,000 advanced manufacturing jobs in North Carolina. This expansion builds on Amazon's prior $10 billion investment in North Carolina's cloud computing infrastructure. The partnership will also include a workforce development program to train fiber optic technicians, strengthening the domestic supply chain and manufacturing base.

feed.title: NYC pensions seeks bids for index funds run by BlackRock, State Street
feed.summary: The New York City pension funds are inviting bids for managing index funds currently overseen by BlackRock and State Street. This move opens up competition for the firms that manage a significant portion of the city'

feed.title: Penumbra’s FDA nod for clot removal tech a win for Boston Scientific
feed.summary: Penumbra has received FDA clearance for its Thunderbolt computer-assisted vacuum thrombectomy device, designed for clot removal in stroke patients. This approval is seen as a significant win for Boston Scientific, which is in the process of acquiring Penumbra for $14.5 billion. Analysts project that the Thunderbolt technology could generate an additional $100 million in revenue for Boston Scientific over time.

feed.title: Global Markets Conference 2026: Expert Perspectives on Investment, Risk and Technology
feed.summary: J.P. Morgan's Global Markets Conference 2026 highlighted expert perspectives on investment, risk, and technology, revealing that global markets show resilience despite conflicts and inflation, with the U.S. and emerging markets leading growth. Geopolitical tensions are significantly impacting market pricing, trade policies, and investment, while AI has become a major driver of earnings and risk management. The conference also addressed revised growth and inflation forecasts, commodity outlooks, and critical risk factors in private credit markets.

feed.title: How Investors May Respond To Eversource Energy (ES) After Court-Backed Cuts To Allowed Returns
feed.summary: A recent court decision upheld lower allowed returns for transmission owners in the MISO region, potentially impacting Eversource Energy and other New England utilities facing significant refund demands. This ruling introduces regulatory risk for Eversource, highlighting the importance of its balance sheet repairs and cost securitization efforts. Investors should monitor how this decision or similar future rulings might affect Eversource's earnings guidance and its long-term investment narrative.

feed.title: ZTS Shareholder Alert: Zoetis Inc. Securities Class Action
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for Zoetis Inc. (NYSE: ZTS), announcing a securities class action lawsuit. The complaint alleges that Zoetis made misleading statements and failed to disclose critical information regarding its products, including weakening prescription growth for Librela due to FDA safety warnings, loss of market share for Simparica Trio, and substantial market share loss for Apoquel and Cytopoint. Shareholders who purchased ZTS shares between January 14, 2025, and May 6, 2026, are encouraged to contact the law firm, with a lead plaintiff deadline of July 27, 2026.

feed.title: Gelteq Successfully Completes Veterinary Palatability Trials with Kemin, Further Validating Gelteq® Technology for Animal Health Applications
feed.summary: Gelteq Limited successfully completed veterinary palatability trials with Kemin Industries, validating its proprietary gel-based delivery platform for animal health applications. The trials demonstrated strong canine acceptance and the technology's ability to mask bitter flavors, which is crucial for developing animal therapeutics. This success is expected to strengthen Gelteq's position in the veterinary therapeutics landscape and facilitate strategic partnerships.

feed.title: Dogs accept gels that hide bitter medicine, Gelteq trials show
feed.summary: Gelteq (ASX:GELS) has successfully completed veterinary palatability trials with Kemin Industries, validating its gel-based delivery platform for animal health. The trials demonstrated strong canine acceptance and effective masking of bitter flavors, confirming the technology's potential for veterinary pharmaceutical applications. These results are expected to strengthen Gelteq's position for strategic partnerships within the animal health sector.

feed.title: 'Impossible to Cover Expenses': McDonald's Rival Blames California's $20 Minimum Wage for Bankruptcy Filing
feed.summary: Sun Gir CEO Harshad Dharod is closing 10 Carl's Jr. locations and selling 49 others in California, citing California's $20 minimum wage and a lack of support from Carl's Jr. as reasons for the company's Chapter 11 bankruptcy filing. Dharod, who operates 65 Carl's Jr. franchises, claims to be losing over $600,000 per month despite generating over $6 million in monthly revenue. The impacted stores, mostly in Los Angeles County, are expected to be sold by the end of summer.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare earns top health system honor for fourth straight year
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare's Mountain Division, which includes West Valley Medical Center and Eastern Idaho Regional Medical Center, has been named one of the nation’s 15 Top Health Systems by Modern Healthcare for the fourth consecutive year. This recognition is based on an objective quantification of clinical outcomes, operational efficiency, and patient experience, with the Mountain Division being one of only three systems to consistently make the list. The study highlighted the top performers' significant achievements in lower inpatient mortality and fewer healthcare-associated infections.

feed.title: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Reminds Zoetis, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has announced that a class action lawsuit has been filed against Zoetis, Inc. (NYSE:ZTS) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between January 14, 2025, and May 6, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Zoetis made misleading statements and failed to disclose issues regarding weakening prescription growth for its canine pain treatment Librela, loss of market share for Simparica Trio, and substantial market share loss for its dermatology products due to competing treatments. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm before the July 27, 2026 deadline to apply for lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Newmont acquires 13.32% stake in LunR Royalties via dividend
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation has acquired a 13.32% stake in LunR Royalties Corp. by receiving 16,099,564 common shares as a dividend-in-kind from Lundin Gold Inc. This strategic move, which involved no cash payment from Newmont, aligns with its investment objectives and high shareholder yield strategy. Newmont stated the shares are held for investment purposes and the company may adjust its holdings in the future.

feed.title: FSK Shareholder Alert: Investors With Losses May Seek to
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm is notifying shareholders of FS KKR Capital Corp (NYSE: FSK) about a securities class action lawsuit. Investors who purchased FSK shares between May 8, 2024, and February 25, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm regarding potential lead plaintiff appointment. The lawsuit alleges that the company made materially false and/or misleading statements concerning its portfolio restructuring, valuation, and distribution strategy.

feed.title: Is Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (KDP) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (KDP) as a potential investment, highlighting a bullish thesis from Quality At A Fair Price’s Substack. The investment rationale centers on KDP's attractive valuation, resilient consumer staples positioning, and compelling dividend yield of approximately 3.5%, suggesting the stock may be undervalued. KDP's diverse portfolio across hot and cold beverages, strong brand recognition, and consistent dividend growth further solidify its position as an attractive long-term investment opportunity.

feed.title: Is Hormel Foods Corporation (HRL) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
feed.summary: This article summarizes a bullish thesis on Hormel Foods Corporation (HRL), highlighting its undervaluation based on dividend yield theory. HRL, a leading packaged food company with strong brands, operates in resilient categories, providing stable cash flows and pricing power. Despite recent slower dividend growth, the company's long-term dividend profile, strong balance sheet, and defensive product portfolio suggest potential for margin recovery, earnings growth, and capital appreciation for dividend-oriented investors.

feed.title: World of HR: T-Mobile expands in India with new tech center
feed.summary: T-Mobile US has opened a new 250,000 square foot tech center in Hyderabad, India, aiming to employ around 1,000 people by 2027 to support its internal engineering and technology functions. This expansion follows layoffs in the US, though T-Mobile states the roles in India are conversions of existing contractors and unrelated to US job cuts. The move aligns with a broader trend of American companies establishing global capability centers in India.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide Corp. Stock (US68902V1070): shares in focus after recent dividend and earnings backdr
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide Corp. shares are under investor scrutiny on the NYSE following its latest dividend, recent quarterly earnings, and robust cash generation, particularly from its service segment. The company, a global leader in elevators and escalators, leverages a stable installed base and recurring service revenues to balance cyclical new equipment sales, appealing to industrial investors seeking steady cash flow. Its financial profile and strategic focus on service and modernization initiatives position it as a specialized industrial name within the S&P 500.

feed.title: Here's how much Costco paid for a planned Irondale site
feed.summary: Costco has purchased land in Irondale for a new membership-only retailer location, including a warehouse, parking lot, and gas station. This will be their second store in the Birmingham area. The article, written by Commercial Real Estate Reporter Samuel Stettheimer, reveals the price point of the newly acquired land off exit 27.

feed.title: Genuine Parts Company Stock (US3724601055): Valuation metrics under the microscope after recent cons
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Company's stock is under scrutiny due to recent sideways trading, prompting investors to re-evaluate its valuation and fundamentals after its latest earnings. The analysis focuses on how its P/E and cash flow metrics compare to its growth profile and cyclical markets, considering its stable cash flows, dividend policy, and acquisition strategy. The article also examines profitability, cash generation, capital allocation, and relative valuation against peers to determine if its current valuation remains justified.

feed.title: Nucor Vulcraft steel joists: a workhorse for commercial building projects
feed.summary: Nucor Vulcraft steel joists are a fundamental component in U.S. commercial and industrial construction, known for their standardized load-carrying abilities, wide span options, and seamless integration with deck systems for roofs and floors. These open-web steel members are engineered to meet strict design standards, helping contractors optimize costs and construction time. They are a significant part of Nucor Corporation's steel products segment, supporting various nonresidential construction projects.

feed.title: Aras Named a Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for PLM Software in Discrete Manufacturing Industries
feed.summary: Aras has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for PLM Software in Discrete Manufacturing Industries. This recognition highlights Aras's belief in a paradigm shift in PLM towards digital thread solutions, governed engineering AI, and platforms that connect product information for lifecycle intelligence. Aras Innovator's open, model-driven platform helps manufacturers manage complex products, adapt to changing business needs, and support AI-driven workflows.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips Stock (COP) Moved Up by 3.31% on Jun 12: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips (COP) stock increased by 3.31% on June 12, driven by positive analyst sentiment, strong fundamentals, and upward revisions to 2026 earnings estimates. Despite intraday volatility caused by fluctuating crude oil prices and geopolitical headlines, the stock maintained a net positive close. The company's recent dividend and outperformance of the Energy - Fossil Fuels sector also contributed to investor confidence, though risks like uncompetitive debt-adjusted free cash flow yield and environmental compliance issues remain.

feed.title: Palantir Technologies Inc Stock (PLTR) Moved Down by 3.08% on Jun 12: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. (PLTR) stock fell by 3.08% on June 12, driven by technical trading patterns and increased scrutiny over its government contracts, particularly in the UK. The company faced a blocked £50 million contract with the Metropolitan Police Service and urged activation of a break clause in its NHS contract. Despite strong Q1 2026 financial results, analysts note PLTR's premium valuation makes it susceptible to corrections amid negative news and technical weakness.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum Corp Stock (MPC) Moved Up by 5.06% on Jun 12: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum Corp (MPC) saw its stock rise by 5.06% due to positive analyst revisions, strong Q1 2026 financial results, and favorable refining sector dynamics. Geopolitical factors causing crude surplus and product scarcity, along with tight global refining capacity, are contributing to high refining margins. The company's strategic capital allocation and potential undervaluation also support investor confidence.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Tests SpheriCal Calibration As Potential Edge In Mass Spectrometry
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE:TMO) has entered a Material Transfer Agreement with Polymer Factory Sweden AB to evaluate Polymer Factory's SpheriCal® calibration technology for its mass spectrometry workflows. This agreement focuses on technical assessment rather than commercial commitments, aiming to enhance accuracy and reproducibility in advanced analytical data. While there's no immediate revenue impact, a successful evaluation could lead to future product decisions, strengthen customer stickiness, and differentiate Thermo Fisher's instruments against competitors.

feed.title: Newmont picks up 16M LunR shares in no-cash dividend windfall
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation announced that its subsidiary received 16,099,564 common shares of LunR Royalties Corp. as a dividend-in-kind from Lundin Gold Inc. This transaction, executed without any cash consideration from Newmont, represents approximately 13.32% of LunR's issued and outstanding common shares. Newmont holds these shares for investment purposes and may adjust its holdings based on market conditions and other circumstances.

feed.title: GE HealthCare expands equipment management partnership with Carilion Clinic
feed.summary: GE HealthCare is expanding its clinical engineering services partnership with Carilion Clinic to include advanced asset management and real-time equipment tracking. Carilion Clinic will deploy GE HealthCare’s Advanced Asset Management Program (AAMP) and Encompass real-time location system (RTLS) to enhance visibility and management of mobile medical equipment across its Virginia health system. This collaboration aims to improve operational efficiency, ensure medical device availability for patient care, and reduce variations in equipment management processes.

feed.title: Baron Real Estate Fund Added Digital Realty Trust (DLR) Amid Improved Valuation
feed.summary: The Baron Real Estate Fund increased its position in Digital Realty Trust (DLR) in Q1 2026, citing improved valuation and a favorable supply/demand backdrop for data centers. This decision comes after trimming DLR at the start of 2025 due to a valuation premium. Despite its inclusion in the fund, Digital Realty Trust is not listed among the 40 most popular stocks among hedge funds heading into 2026, with the article suggesting other AI stocks might offer greater upside for investors.

feed.title: Director at Harvard Bioscience (HBIO) granted 16,556 restricted stock units
feed.summary: Harvard Bioscience director Katherine A. Eade was granted 16,556 restricted stock units (RSUs) of common stock at no cost. These RSUs will vest either before the company's next annual meeting or one year from the grant date, whichever comes first. Following this transaction, Eade beneficially owns a total of 58,669 Harvard Bioscience shares, adjusted for a 10-for-1 reverse stock split that occurred on March 13, 2026.

feed.title: Is Western Digital's Free Cash Flow Supporting Long-Term Growth?
feed.summary: Western Digital Corporation's strong free cash flow generation is bolstering its long-term growth strategy, shareholder returns, and financial stability, with a recent 20% dividend increase and significant share repurchases. The company has also strengthened its balance sheet by reducing debt and maintaining a net cash position of $450 million. With positive financial performance, improved estimates, and a "Strong Buy" Zacks Rank, Western Digital is well-positioned to capitalize on AI-driven storage demand.

feed.title: Enterprise value of AT&T Inc Shs Cert Deposito Arg Repr 0.3333 Shs – BCBA:T.CI
feed.summary: This article provides access to the enterprise value data for AT&T Inc. shares trading on the Buenos Aires Stock Exchange under the ticker T.CI. It mentions the market status as closed and highlights that financial data, news, and technical analysis are available for this specific security.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation Acquires LunR Shares via Dividend
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation has acquired 16,099,564 common shares of LunR, representing 13.32% of LunR's issued shares, through a dividend-in-kind from Lundin Gold. This strategic move, which involved no cash consideration, positions Newmont as a significant investor in LunR. Newmont plans to periodically reassess its investment and comply with Canadian securities laws by filing an early warning report to ensure transparency.

feed.title: McDonald’s Is Letting AI Take Your Orders Again. A Million Orders Later, the Results Look Promising.
feed.summary: McDonald's has successfully re-introduced an AI-powered order-taking system, ArchIQ, in partnership with Google, after a previous failed attempt with IBM. The new system, currently in five U.S. branches, boasts a 90% success rate across over a million transactions, aligning with McDonald's "McDonald's > NEXT" strategy to boost growth and productivity. While aiming to improve customer interaction and overall hospitality, the initiative faces mixed customer reactions and concerns about job displacement due to AI adoption.

feed.title: Electronic Arts Inc. Shs Cert Deposito Arg Repr 0.0714285714 Sh Revenue Breakdown – BCBA:EA.CI
feed.summary: This article provides a revenue breakdown for Electronic Arts Inc. (BCBA:EA.CI), highlighting that the greatest contribution came from its International segment. In the last year, this segment accounted for 5.99 trillion ARS, increasing from 4.25 trillion ARS the previous year. The data is presented within the context of market financials, including statements, statistics, dividends, earnings, and revenue for the company's shares.

feed.title: DOW vs. APD: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
feed.summary: This article compares Dow Inc. (DOW) and Air Products and Chemicals (APD) to determine which is the better value stock in the Chemical - Diversified sector. Using Zacks Rank and Style Scores, DOW is identified as the superior choice due to its stronger earnings outlook and more attractive valuation metrics, including lower P/E, PEG, and P/B ratios compared to APD.

feed.title: BlackRock gets fresh chance to keep NYC pension assets despite climate concerns
feed.summary: New York City Comptroller Mark Levine has opened a rebidding process for managing city pension money, giving BlackRock a chance to retain its contracts despite his predecessor's recommendation to drop the asset manager over its climate record. Levine emphasized the need to re-evaluate relationships and select managers that meet high performance standards, while BlackRock expressed its desire to continue its long-standing client relationship with New York City. This decision comes as large asset managers face increasing scrutiny from pension funds regarding their stances on climate and social issues.

feed.title: Xfinity Internet: Comcast's mainstream broadband option for US homes
feed.summary: Xfinity Internet is Comcast Corp.'s primary broadband service for US households, offering a variety of speed tiers, Wi-Fi equipment, and bundle options. The service is available across many states and D.C., predominantly in metro and suburban areas, using mostly DOCSIS cable modem technology with growing fiber expansion. Customers can choose from different plans, hardware configurations, and bundles that include mobile, TV, or home security services, with pricing and data policies varying by region.

feed.title: The Campbell’s Company celebrates expansion of Maxton manufacturing facility
feed.summary: The Campbell's Company celebrated the expansion of its aseptic manufacturing facility in Maxton, N.C., marking a significant investment in advanced manufacturing, increased production capacity for its soup and broth portfolio, and the creation of over 100 new jobs. The expansion includes a new aseptic processing line and state-of-the-art sterilization technologies to improve product consistency, support future growth, and enhance production scale. This initiative reinforces the Maxton site's role within Campbell's manufacturing network and reflects strong community partnership.

feed.title: Western Digital (WDC) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
feed.summary: Shares of Western Digital (WDC) jumped 6.2% after receiving an analyst upgrade to an overweight rating and optimism in the AI-storage market was reignited by a peer's capacity announcement from South Korea. A broader market rebound, fueled by a drop in the 10-year Treasury yield, also contributed to the positive movement for the semiconductor stock. The company has seen significant growth in 2026, with its stock up 197% since the beginning of the year.

feed.title: See Norway, Iceland and Greenland on 2027 small-ship cruises
feed.summary: Oceania Cruises (NYSE:NCLH) has announced its 2027 Northern Europe season, featuring small-ship voyages to destinations including Scandinavia, the Baltic, British Isles, Iceland, Greenland, and Norway. The itineraries, ranging from 10 to 14 days, will be sailed by the Insignia, Marina, and Vista, offering access to both major hubs and lesser-visited ports. These cruises emphasize curated shore excursions focused on cuisine, culture, history, and outdoor exploration.

feed.title: Oceania Cruises® Spotlights 2027 Northern Europe Itineraries
feed.summary: Oceania Cruises has announced its 2027 Northern Europe itineraries, featuring voyages to Scandinavia, the British Isles, Iceland, Greenland, and Norway on its intimate, luxurious ships. These destination-focused cruises highlight unique ports and offer immersive shore excursions centered on local cuisine, culture, and history. The itineraries, aboard ships like Oceania Insignia, Marina, and Vista, allow guests to explore both iconic cities and lesser-known coastal towns.

feed.title: Kenvue Canada saves big on diesel costs with Fuel Transport EV pilot
feed.summary: Kenvue Canada, in partnership with Fuel Transport, is piloting an electric truck for short-haul routes in the greater Toronto area, resulting in nearly 45% savings on diesel costs. The pilot, which started in January and runs through December, aims to evaluate the long-term viability, operational realities, and performance of EV trucks in urban and colder weather conditions. This initiative reflects Kenvue's commitment to sustainable supply chain models and could potentially expand to other markets, including the U.S.

feed.title: Director at Smurfit Westrock (SW) gains 51 RSUs via dividend equivalents
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock plc director Suzan F. Harrison received an automatic grant of 51 restricted stock units (RSUs) as dividend equivalents on her existing awards. This grant, tied to a quarterly dividend of $0.4523 per ordinary share, increased her direct holdings to 28,006 ordinary shares, which includes 4,489 unvested RSUs set to vest by May 1, 2027, or the next annual stockholder meeting. The transaction was a compensatory equity award and not an open-market purchase or sale.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock (SW) CAO granted ordinary shares and RSUs in equity awards
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock plc's Chief Accounting Officer, Irene Page, received a grant of 25 ordinary shares and 163 restricted stock units (RSUs) on June 10, 2026, as routine equity awards. The RSUs were accrued as dividend equivalents tied to the company's quarterly dividend. Following these transactions, Page directly holds 62,735 ordinary shares and 14,209 RSUs, with the RSUs scheduled to vest and settle in February 2027 or in three equal annual installments.
